proposal.working_title: AGI Development Roadmap: How Mid-Market Operators Should Prepare for the 2027 Capability Jump
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AGI coverage is futurist hype; this post lays out the concrete 4-phase posture mid-market operators need now (data foundations, agent governance, talent retention, customer trust) so the team is ready when capabilities jump, not scrambling on launch day.
outline_bullets: Why AGI Development Discussions Mislead Operators (And What to Track Instead)
The 4-Phase Operator Posture: Data Foundations, Agent Governance, Talent, Customer Trust
What Mid-Market Teams Are Already Building to Stay Optionality-Heavy Through 2027
proposal.cannibalization_rationale: no overlap detected against current inventory
